THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RATTLEY, JESSICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2 REUEL COURT #A, SAN FRANCISCO $747.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $118.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,215.00, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EXECUTION AS LONG AS DEFT PAYS $ 50.00 PER MONTH BEG JAN 15, 1998 WHILE MAINTAINING CURRENT RENT.
